overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a fighter spacecraft navigating through a green nebula environment. The ship cruises through scattered debris fields and past large structural wreckage before emerging into open cosmic clouds. The footage appears to be from a high-fidelity space simulation game with cinematic lighting and particle effects.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a fighter spacecraft cruising through a vast green nebula. Small asteroid debris floats throughout the scene, while dark shapes of distant wreckage loom ahead. The camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective as the ship advances through the cosmic environment.

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft enters a dense field of structural wreckage, navigating between large metal debris and twisted platforms. The nebula background becomes partially obscured by the wreckage as the ship weaves through the tight corridor of floating debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: open nebula space with cosmic cloud formations

events.description: exiting wreckage field into open nebula space with unobstructed views

fine particulate matter and faint stars scattered throughout the void

segments.scene_description: Having cleared the wreckage field, the spacecraft emerges into open nebula space. The green cosmic clouds stretch endlessly in all directions with subtle luminous streaks and formations visible in the distance. The ship maintains a steady cruise through the serene, obstacle-free environment for the remainder of the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a fighter spacecraft as it transitions from a sparse debris field through a dense corridor of wreckage and into a vast, open nebula. It begins with the ship cruising through a green cosmic expanse dotted with small asteroids and the looming silhouettes of distant ruins. As the spacecraft advances, the environment tightens into a crowded field of twisted metal platforms and large structural debris that partially obscures the nebula background. The scene then opens up as the ship clears the wreckage, emerging into a serene stretch of endless green clouds. Finally, the camera maintains a steady follow as the vessel glides through the luminous streaks and open formations of the deep space environment.
